project: Cooperation in the development of the Turris Omina router
title: CZ.NIC: Spoluprace pri vyvoji routeru Turris Omnia

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: Cooperation in the development of the Turris Omina router

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: Router, Turris, Omnia, Security, Drivers, Testing, Development

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The aim of the project is to provide services, based on the CZ.NIC requirements, that will consist mainly of cooperation in hardware design, hardware testing, design and development of drivers, operating system and software equipment for the Turris, router preparation of hardware and software support for use as a gateway for IoT, etc.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Korcek Pavol, Ing., Ph.D. (RG EHW) – research leader Kosar Vlastimil, Ing., Ph.D. (DCSY) Musil Petr, Ing., Ph.D. (CM-SFE) Smrz Pavel, doc. RNDr., Ph.D. (DCGM) Viktorin Jan, Ing.

results_with_impact_on_practice.label: Results with Impact on Practice
results_with_impact_on_practice.text: - Souhrnna vyzkumna zprava k projektu Spoluprace pri vyvoji routeru Turris Omnia , summary research report, 2016 Authors : KORCEK, P.
